title: Your CI re-ran 200 checks. Reactor re-ran 3 — the ones your 4-line diff actually touched.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: cold boot · the whole CI runs once (every build, test, lint) · merge GREEN

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: nothing changed · every check memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · merge-gate re-checks itself · no work, no cost

beats.name: hero-leaf
beats.caption: HERO: a 4-line pkg-ui diff wakes only the ui lane · 5 packages stay dark

beats.name: hub-fanout
beats.caption: a pkg-core diff fans out · ui/api/auth rebuild · utils+billing stay dark

beats.name: red-fail
beats.caption: a pkg-api test throws RED · merge-gate BLOCKED · no merge this tick

beats.name: green-recover
beats.caption: the fix lands · pkg-api test GREEN · merge-gate fans in to GREEN

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: CI goes quiet again · nothing to re-run · cost back to flat
